content: The performance gap between intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM), random network distillation (RND), and hand-designed curious agents can be closed by reusing the 2024-2025 SOTA differentiable episodic memory architecture from active learning agents, which stores unexpected state encounters instead of discarding them after a single prediction update. This creates a hybrid 'curiosity replay' framework that retains the broad exploration of count-based RND while preserving the targeted, context-aware exploration of hand-crafted curious agents.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
